name: movinet_mobilevit_classifier_head

recommended_runs.reason: Default MobileViT-style head activation with the cleanest first-pass hyperparameters.
Preserves more spatial structure before attention to test whether the default token pooling is too aggressive.
Lower-capacity variant to reduce overfitting risk if the larger head is noisy or unstable.

implementation_summary.exact_feature_implemented: Added an optional MobileViT-style MoViNet classifier head that pools the final MoViNet feature map into a compact token set, applies lightweight self-attention, pools the attended tokens, and emits the existing binary logits.

constraints_checked: The pretrained MoViNet backbone was not modified or replaced.
Only the classifier head behavior was changed.
The new head is optional and controlled entirely through config.

notes: ruff was not available in the environment.
